CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Cantonese interpreter, Rebecca Chan, is present to assist Petitioner. No other appearances. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-06-2015 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-07-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant''S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Aug-27-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DANIEL BERKO, ESQ. of the Law Office of Daniel Berko, Tel No. 415-771-6174 appearing for Plaintiffs/Cross-Defendants Miao Qiong Huang and Guorong Li;
Atty. JAIMIE BOMBARD, ESQ. of Steven Adair MacDonald & Partners, P.C., Tel No. 415-956-6488 appearing for Defendant/Cross-Complainant Henry Kai Hong Lui.

The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at the hearing. Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court rules as follows: Defendant/Cross-Complainant Henry Kai Hong Lui's Motion to Compel Discovery Responses, For Production of Documents is granted in part and denied in part. The Court takes the cross-motions for sanctions under submission. The Court shall prepare and send out a formal order to parties. Judge Pro Tem: Sigrid Irias, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses, For Production Of Documents, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-13-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant''s Motion to Compel Discovery Responses is Continued to August 21, 2015 per stipulation of the parties and transferred to department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. All courtesy copies to be delivered to department 301 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
